candidates.why: Gross sales line, but royalties are shown separately and a netted top-line revenue row also exists.
Most direct top-line revenue/sales measure after royalties; appears to be the primary reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the primary reported revenue line rather than gross oil and gas sales because royalties are separately reported and net revenue is the cleaner REVT measure.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Production costs' from the Income Statement preview as the best match for direct production/service costs (COGS/cost of sales). Manual review required because this was selected outside the candidate list.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but a more explicit populated SG&A line exists.

variables.notes: The candidate list misses the more semantically correct explicit SG&A row. candidates.why: This is exploration/business development, not clearly research and development.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line is present. 'Exploration and business development costs' does not clearly match R&D, so treated XRD as missing.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; useful fallback when explicit interest expense is missing.
Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow; only lease-related interest, not total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be preferred over explicit reported line.
Balancing/other finance items, not core interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: use explicit 'Interest expense' when available; fall back to broader 'Finance costs' for periods like 2025 where explicit interest expense is absent.

candidates.why: Direct total shareholders' equity line; best book equity measure and excludes NCI if separately reported.
Not equity; total balance sheet size, so not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Selected shareholders' equity lines as book equity. Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total'; included 'Shareholders equity' as fallback label variant. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Shareholders equity
